summary_en: 605,000 shares (1.97% S/O) to be acquired for ¥134.92M via ToSTNeT-3 on May 22, 2026 at closing price of ¥223/share. Under broader authorization approved Dec 12, 2025 and May 18, 2026: up to 4,100,000 shares (13.37% S/O) for ¥820M through Dec 11, 2026. Cumulative acquisitions as of May 21, 2026: 2,057,000 shares for ¥466.24M.
title_en: Notice regarding acquisition of treasury shares via off-hours trading (ToSTNeT-3)
translation_en_brief:
MBK Co., Ltd. announced on May 21, 2026 that its board of directors has resolved to acquire up to 605,000 treasury shares (1.97% of outstanding shares) for a maximum of ¥134.92M via ToSTNeT-3 off-hours trading on May 22, 2026 at the closing price of ¥223 per share. The acquisition order is limited to the specified trading time window.

This block acquisition is undertaken pursuant to a broader authorization approved by the board on December 12, 2025 and May 18, 2026, which permitted acquisition of up to 4,100,000 shares (13.37% of outstanding shares) for ¥820M during the period from January 30, 2026 through December 11, 2026. As of May 21, 2026, the company has cumulatively acquired 2,057,000 shares for ¥466.24M under this authorization. Results of the May 22 acquisition will be disclosed upon completion of the trading session.
